failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation due to cooling or impurities
failure_modes.mitigation: Regular maintenance and inspection of BPR valve

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.32917 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform a thermal cycling test from 100°C to 120°C to check for cavitation onset
Conduct a long-term stability test of the BPR valve under operating conditions
